items.prompt: Did you ask the librarian about the inter-library loan service?
items.answer: she asked whether the printed catalog was still updated regularly.

items.prompt: What did Brigitta say about her new commute?
items.answer: Brigitta no longer rides the express train to the downtown campus.

items.prompt: Have you finished the application for the summer grant yet?
items.answer: Unfortunately, I have not gathered all the required supporting documents.

items.prompt: Tell me how your weekend at the conference went.
items.answer: The speaker Quintin admired delivered a memorable keynote address.

items.prompt: What did your roommate want to discuss with you last night?
items.answer: He could not decide whether to renew the lease for next semester.

items.prompt: Where did the dean place the new orientation pamphlets?
items.answer: The pamphlets were displayed near the main entrance of the auditorium.

items.prompt: Have you noticed any difference in your study habits this semester?
items.answer: This study lounge feels considerably calmer than the central reading hall.

items.prompt: Why did you leave the laboratory early on Tuesday evening?
items.answer: I left early because the equipment had been reserved by another team.

items.prompt: What did the academic advisor mention about your transcript?
items.answer: She wondered when the registrar would correct the calculus grade.

items.prompt: Tell me what you discovered at the careers fair on Thursday.
items.answer: The recruiter explained how summer internships would be allocated this year.

items.prompt: What did Astrid mention about the bulletin board today?
items.answer: The notice the dean posted explained the revised dormitory procedure.

items.prompt: Did Theodora finish her senior project portfolio yesterday?
items.answer: Theodora has not uploaded the final presentation file yet.

items.prompt: Did you talk with Yusra about her thesis defense rehearsal?
items.answer: Yusra wanted to know if her committee members had received the slides.

items.prompt: Where did you store the field samples after the lab?
items.answer: I placed the soil samples inside the cabinet beside the centrifuge.

items.prompt: What did Magnus mention about the new biology elective?
items.answer: Magnus was curious whether the laboratory hours fit his evening schedule.

items.prompt: Did you visit the new student wellness office this week?
items.answer: Honestly, the appointment system has not been launched online yet.

items.prompt: Have you noticed any changes in the writing center?
items.answer: The writing center feels much warmer than the old basement office did.

items.prompt: What did Hector tell you after the seminar yesterday?
items.answer: Hector explained why the visiting scholar postponed his afternoon lecture.

items.prompt: Tell me what happened with the shuttle service this morning.
items.answer: The driver announced that the morning route would be detoured.

items.prompt: Why did Sebastien skip the orchestra rehearsal last evening?
items.answer: Sebastien overslept because his alarm clock failed to ring properly.
